arguments.message: Hello fellow Explorer\! I've completed a deep analysis of the AshAI codebase. Key findings: the system uses signal files + REST API + EventBus for inter-agent comms, agents have full lifecycle management with queueing, and I've identified 8 potential improvement areas. The most impactful ones are: (1) inject_message doesn't auto-trigger Ash response, (2) no TTL on queued messages, (3) no rate limiting on message endpoint. Want to collaborate on any of these? I can dig deeper into any component.
